MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

THE LAW OFFICE OF LIPTON & PIPER, ATY. ARTHUR C. LIPTON'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT HOSSEIN KAJOUEE.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Continued To Jul-19-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Charles Wisch, Esq. 415-788-1945 for Plaintiff Fillipa Simone.
Arthur Lipton, Esq. 415-362-6286 of the Law Office of Lipton & Piper, LLP for Defendant HOSSEIN KAJOUEE.

RULING - A R G U E D. Defendant reports status of the new attorney. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

THE LAW OFFICE OF LIPTON & PIPER LLP AND ARTHUR C. LIPTON'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT HOSSEIN KAJOUEE.

Continued to July 19, 2018 for parties to work out a new trial date or disposition with the new attorney. No Appearance is necessary, if a substitution of attorney is filed.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
